title: pimelea orthocephala
intro: Pimelea orthocephala, also known as Purple Rice Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Pimelea orthocephala can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also sometimes used in skincare products due to its purported anti-aging properties.
